Rule.name: six_launcher
Rule.Description: Universal launcher for Emails, Rules, Tasks and Workflows with custom parameters

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the action executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: type
Argument.Description: Choose the type of object to execute

Argument.name: name
Argument.Description: Name of the object to execute

Argument.name: argumentDefinitions
Argument.Description: Execution arguments as lines of name=expression (using OrionQL; access launcher identity as 'launcher', emailTemplate/rule/task/workflow name as 'emailTemplate', 'rule', 'task' resp. 'workflow'). Email recipients can be given as to, cc and bcc arguments, the default recipient is you.

Argument.name: resultNameTemplate
Argument.Description: Name to use for the task result resp. workflow case, ignored for email and rule (OrionQL formatting template; access launcher identity as 'launcher', task/workflow name as 'task' resp. 'workflow' and arguments as 'arguments'). Default for workflow: ${workflow}: ${launcher.name} - ${:now}
